---
title: "Week 12 — Heteroscedasticity"
subtitle: "ECON 3209 · Kerala Agricultural University"
---

## Week 12 Overview

Understand, detect, and correct for heteroscedasticity. Covers Breusch-Pagan, White test, WLS, and robust standard errors.

| Lecture | Topic | Slides |
|---------|-------|--------|
| Lecture 1 | Nature & Consequences | [Open →](lecture-01.qmd) |
| Lecture 2 | Detection Tests | [Open →](lecture-02.qmd) |
| Lecture 3 | WLS & Robust SE in Python | [Open →](lecture-03.qmd) |
